name: Piesat Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Piesat Information Technology Co., Ltd. engages in research and application of satellite technology for remote sensing satellite and navigation satellite in China. The company offers pixel information expert (PIE), its flagship software for analyzing remote sensing image and data; and PIE-Map, a development platform that provides map navigation secondary development components, such as navigation cloud services and integrating solutions for the government, army, enterprises, and other clients. It also provides IT project consulting service to national satellite projects and other industries. The company was formerly known as Beijing PIESAT Information Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Piesat Information Technology Co., Ltd. in March 2020. Piesat Information Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Beijing, China.
